summary: The primary role of Golgi bodies involves protein modification through processes like carbohydrate addition/removal before directing processed proteins towards various cellular compartments; this includes specifically sorting and packaging modified glycoproteins according to cell needs while ensuring only correctly formed structures proceed with final modifications at the Golgi stage prior distribution throughout cells via vesicles targeting membranes such as plasma membrane among others depending upon nature/destination required by particular type/classified molecule being transported/generated within organism/system under consideration here which may include but not limited to secretory pathway components etc..
